scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:android: npm run build && npx cap sync && npx cap open android
scripts.build:apk: npm run build && npx cap sync android && android\gradlew.bat -p android assembleRelease --no-daemon && copy android\app\build\outputs\apk\release\snehkriti.apk D:\Users\OneDrive\Desktop\snehkriti.apk
